summary: Completed testing of Orientation Field Today feature. All backend tests pass (13/13). Frontend correctly displays 'שדה ההתמצאות היום' section with 4 progress bars, active users/actions count, 'מוביל' badge on dominant direction, and Hebrew insight in violet box. Layout order verified: Identity → Field Today → Decision Path.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: GET /api/orientation/field-today returns all required fields: success, distribution, total_actions, active_users, dominant_direction, insight
GOOD: Distribution includes all 4 positive directions (contribution, recovery, order, exploration) and sums to 100%
GOOD: Percentages rounded to 1 decimal place (e.g., 64.3%, 16.7%)
GOOD: Backend correctly calculates from last 24 hours of user activity across all sessions
GOOD: Dominant direction is correctly identified as the one with highest percentage
GOOD: Hebrew insight text generated correctly ('היום השדה נוטה לכיוון התאוששות')
GOOD: Frontend displays header 'שדה ההתמצאות היום' with violet group icon
GOOD: Active users and actions count displayed ('13 משתמשים פעילים · 42 פעולות')
GOOD: 4 progress bars in correct order: Contribution, Recovery, Order, Exploration
GOOD: Bar colors are distinct (green for contribution, blue for recovery, indigo for order, amber for exploration)
GOOD: 'מוביל' (Leading) badge displayed next to dominant direction (Recovery)
GOOD: Insight displayed in violet-50 background box with violet-100 border
GOOD: All data-testid attributes present: orientation-field-today, distribution-bars, bar-contribution, bar-recovery, bar-order, bar-exploration, field-insight
GOOD: Section positioned correctly: Identity → Field Today → Decision Path
seed_data_creation: Tests use existing production data (42 actions from 13 users in last 24h)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orientation Field Today feature fully tested. Backend calculates 24h distribution from philos_sessions.history timestamps. Frontend component at /app/frontend/src/components/philos/sections/OrientationFieldToday.js. API returns: distribution={contribution, recovery, order, exploration}, active_users, total_actions, dominant_direction, insight (Hebrew).

frontend_tests.layout_order_correct: PASS - Identity → Field Today → Decision Path
